title: Adicea goudotiana

If "Adina goudotiana" is the intended plant, here is the paragraph:

Adina goudotiana is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical rainforests of Madagascar. The health benefits of Adina goudotiana are attributed to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Adina goudotiana include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Adina goudotiana is commonly prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in the form of a decoction, to harness its health benefits.
